final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing interior scene illustration of a 新中式 tea room space for a meditative, tea-drinking atmosphere.

Style/medium: needs a 新中式 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include 原木茶台, 紫砂壶 and 茶杯, 书法卷轴, 盆景, and bamboo shadow play visible through the window
Scene/backdrop: must include a 茶室 interior with 书法卷轴 and 盆景 on the walls/surfaces, and a window with 竹影婆娑 outside
Lighting/mood: needs a 禅意 atmosphere suited for 品茗静思 — exact light quality and mood treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, natural direction evoking 新中式 restraint — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a natural wood and ceramic surface treatment — exact grain and glaze finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
